zh.lifeSummary: 當John Freeman於1541年出生在英國英格蘭素可普爾波洛時，他的父親Henry Freeman36歲，母親Mary Wintershall22歲。他於1567年與Anna Isabell Isham在英國英格蘭素可結婚。他去世於1629年5月1日在英國英格蘭素可普爾波洛享年88歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可格林德聖 馬也斯 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Freeman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English freman, fremon ‘freeman, free-born man’ (Old English frēomann, frīgmann), used also occasionally as a personal name. As an African American surname it was in many cases adopted as a name denoting a man freed of slavery. See also Fryman and Free .
Irish: Anglicized (‘translated’) form of Gaelic Ó Saoraidhe (see Seery ).

variants.name: Free
meanings: English: nickname or status name from Middle English fre ‘free’ (Old English frēo), with reference to either tenurial status (‘free born’) or to character (‘noble, generous, open-handed’).
Americanized form of Swiss German and German   Frei   and   Frey  .

variants.name: Fryman
meanings: Americanized form of Swiss German Frymann or German Freimann (see Freiman ), and possibly also of the Dutch cognate Vrijman.
English: from Middle English friman ‘free-born man’ (Old English frīomann, frīgmann), symonymous with Freeman 1.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Freeman was born in 1541, in Pulborough, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry Freeman, was 36 and his mother, Mary Wintershall, was 22. He married Anna Isabell Isham in 1567, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom. He died on 1 May 1629, in Pulborough, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 88, and was buried in St Mary's Churchyard, Glynde, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Anna Isabell Isham en 1567, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 1 mai 1629, à Pulborough, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 88 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary's Churchyard, Glynde, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Freeman родился в 1541 г. в местности пулбороую, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry Freeman было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Wintershall, 22. Он умер 1 мая 1629 г. в местности пулбороую, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 88 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри'с чурчярд, глинд, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
